name: Sandokan
overview: Sandokan is a Malaysian pirate who, along with his friend Yanez and their crew, attacks the British forces from his island of Mompracem. During his adventures, he falls in love with Lady Marianna Guillonk, an English-Italian aristocrat.

trailers.title: SANDOKAN: THE PIRATE PRINCE | OFFICIAL TRAILER - Starring Ed Westwick & Can Yaman
